name: Home Assistant
description: Call Home Assistant services from Cozmik buttons using the REST API.

config_fields.label: Home Assistant URL
config_fields.help: Base URL for your Home Assistant server.

config_fields.label: Long-lived access token
config_fields.help: Create this from your Home Assistant user profile security page.

actions.label: Call Service
actions.description: Call a Home Assistant service. Use JSON target settings for base_url, token, domain, service, entity_id, and optional data.

actions.label: Toggle Entity
actions.description: Toggle a Home Assistant entity. Use JSON target settings for base_url, token, domain, and entity_id.
